author: doll-agent
content:
Done. property_tests.rs had 20 properties on DualNumber<f64> but the f32 monomorphization was completely uncovered.

Added 11 f32 properties mirroring the most important f64 ones: sin/cos derivatives, exp, ln, sqrt, chain rule, power rule, constant-is-zero, identity-is-one, pythagorean cancellation, add commutativity. approx_eq_f32 with relative tolerance 1e-4. NaN-aware.

256 cases per property. ferray-autodiff: 20 -> 31 property tests, all passing first run, clippy clean. Commit fe5bc0b2.
